# Test JSON-RPC message parsing
cat > jsonrpc_call.json << 'EOF'
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "calculator",
    "arguments": {
      "operation": "add",
      "a": 5,
      "b": 3
    }
  }
}
EOF

# Process JSON-RPC request
exec jsonrpc2gostruct -package rpc jsonrpc_call.json
stdout 'package rpc'
stdout 'ToolsCallRequest struct'
stdout 'Arguments map\[string\]interface{}'
stdout 'Name string'
! stderr 'ERROR'

# Process with custom struct name
exec jsonrpc2gostruct -package rpc -struct CalculatorCall jsonrpc_call.json
stdout 'package rpc'
stdout 'CalculatorCall struct'
